params.description: Animated counting game appears. Minis characters with colored blocks. Four categories: Red, Blue, Green, Yellow. Student counts items in each category. All values are multiples of 5 between 10 and 45.

beats.text: The Minis are organizing their collections! Let's help them count.

elements.description: Animated counting game active. Minis characters with blocks in four colors. Student counts and confirms values for each category.

params.description: Counting game completes. Counts recorded for all four categories.

beats.text: You counted the blocks. Now let's make a graph with your data.

elements.description: Counting game complete. Final counts recorded for Red, Blue, Green, and Yellow blocks.
